mapper.sql: select invoice_id, order_id, invoice_no, invoice_type, amount, tax_amount, total_amount, title, tax_id, apply_status, audit_time, audit_by, audit_opinion, make_status, make_time, post_status, post_time, tracking_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from publisher_invoice
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_invoice ( order_id, invoice_no, invoice_type, amount, tax_amount, total_amount, title, tax_id, apply_status, audit_time, audit_by, audit_opinion, make_status, make_time, post_status, post_time, tracking_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{orderId}, #{invoiceNo}, #{invoiceType}, #{amount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{title}, #{taxId}, #{applyStatus}, #{auditTime}, #{auditBy}, #{auditOpinion}, #{makeStatus}, #{makeTime}, #{postStatus}, #{postTime}, #{trackingNo}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_invoice where invoice_id in
#{invoiceId}
